tasks.subject: Task 1: Reactivate Python core block and lock the system interpreter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restore PYTHONSTARTUP, remove the dead PYTHONHOME/OMZP::python lines, add guards that prevent pip/user-site writes to the brew Python, and harden python/startup.py.

**Files:**
- Modify: zsh/.zshrc:196-211 (python core block)
- Modify: python/startup.py:6 (XDG fallback)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- python3 under HOMEBREW_PREFIX and PYTHONHOME unset
- PYTHONSTARTUP/PIP_REQUIRE_VIRTUALENV=1/PIP_USER=0/PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 exported
- pip install outside venv refused
- no :python-load or OMZP::python
- startup.py survives unset XDG_DATA_HOME

**Verify:** zsh -ic 'echo home=${PYTHONHOME:-unset}; echo startup=$PYTHONSTARTUP; echo rv=$PIP_REQUIRE_VIRTUALENV nus=$PYTHONNOUSERSITE; command -v python3'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc", "python/startup.py"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'echo home=${PYTHONHOME:-unset}; echo startup=$PYTHONSTARTUP; echo rv=$PIP_REQUIRE_VIRTUALENV nus=$PYTHONNOUSERSITE; command -v python3'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["python3 under HOMEBREW_PREFIX and PYTHONHOME unset", "PYTHONSTARTUP/PIP_REQUIRE_VIRTUALENV=1/PIP_USER=0/PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 exported", "pip install outside venv refused", "no :python-load or OMZP::python", "startup.py survives unset XDG_DATA_HOME"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Move argcomplete to uv and wire zsh global + per-tool completion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the brew python-argcomplete formula with a uv-installed argcomplete, register argcomplete's zsh global completer via the eval annex, and fix the broken :checkov-eval shell flag.

**Files:**
- Modify: zsh/.zshrc:230-242 (argcomplete block)
- Modify: zsh/.zshrc:326-328 (:checkov-eval)
- Modify: Brewfile:43 (remove python-argcomplete)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- python-argcomplete removed from Brewfile
- register-python-argcomplete resolves to ~/.cache/uv/bin
- zshrc has with"uv" argcomplete + :argcomplete-eval
- :checkov-eval uses --shell zsh
- _python_argcomplete_global defined in fresh shell

**Verify:** zsh -ic 'command -v register-python-argcomplete; print "fn=${+functions[_python_argcomplete_global]}"'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc", "Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'command -v register-python-argcomplete; print \"fn=${+functions[_python_argcomplete_global]}\"'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["python-argcomplete removed from Brewfile", "register-python-argcomplete resolves to ~/.cache/uv/bin", "zshrc has with uv argcomplete + :argcomplete-eval", ":checkov-eval uses --shell zsh", "_python_argcomplete_global defined in fresh shell"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Enable mise per-repo uv venv auto-activation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Configure mise to auto-create and source a per-repo .venv via uv, without registering any global Python.

**Files:**
- Modify: mise/config.toml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [settings] python.uv_venv_auto = create|source present
- no global python under [tools]
- scratch repo auto-creates/sources .venv

**Verify:** zsh -ic 'd=$(mktemp -d); cd "$d"; echo "3.13" > .python-version; mise trust -q .; mise install -q; ls -d .venv 2>/dev/null && python -c "import sys; print(sys.prefix)"; cd /; rm -rf "$d"'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mise/config.toml"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'd=$(mktemp -d); cd \"$d\"; echo \"3.13\" > .python-version; mise trust -q .; mise install -q; ls -d .venv 2>/dev/null && python -c \"import sys; print(sys.prefix)\"; cd /; rm -rf \"$d\"'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["[settings] python.uv_venv_auto = create|source present", "no global python under [tools]", "scratch repo auto-creates/sources .venv"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite the README Python section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the documentation match the new three-layer model (brew system Python, mise per-repo versions, uv/uvx tooling, pip lockdown, argcomplete via uv).

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md:469-502 (Python section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- no PYTHONHOME=brew claim
- documents brew/mise/uv/pip-lockdown/argcomplete-via-uv
- no brew python-argcomplete reference

**Verify:** grep -n -iE "PYTHONHOME|python-argcomplete|uv_venv_auto|mise sync python" README.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n -iE \"PYTHONHOME|python-argcomplete|uv_venv_auto|mise sync python\" README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no PYTHONHOME=brew claim", "documents brew/mise/uv/pip-lockdown/argcomplete-via-uv", "no brew python-argcomplete reference"]}
```
